pages: Hello, unyu! I'm assuming you're an unyu.
Did you know? I am placing helpful signs everywhere to help Unyus survive the winter.
I heard they need to collect those fire orbs because they're so weak and frail and dumb.
No offense though.
Anyway, did you know?
You can spit liquid out by pressing B. The droplet will freeze shortly afterwards, creating a platform.
If you hold UP, the platform will be above you. Otherwise, it will be to the side.
Also, if you hold DOWN, the platform will be placed closer when placed to the side.
You can refill your liquid meter at a dispenser. They serve as respawn points as well.
If you ever get stuck, you can respawn to the last dispenser from the pause menu.
I hope this information was useful!
Hello, unyu!
Did you know? The water is dangerously cold! This is because the environment is very cold. Did you know that?
It could be fatal for an Unyu. I don't know how that kills them though. It's not even that cold.
I hope this information was useful!
Did you know? There is a Blux up ahead. Oh no!
Don't ask how I knew that ahead of time. Too complicated.
Fortunately, you can shoot at it by switching to attack mode by pressing L.
Then, by pressing B, you will spit water bullets in the direction you are facing.
You can even shoot up and downwards if you're holding the respective directions down. Did you know that?
I hope this information was useful!
...Oh! I almost forgot to mention:
Your fire rate is unlimited. So you shoot as fast as you can mash the button.
I hope that information was useful as well!
Did you know? You can push objects!
Also, you can't place platforms on torches or sky holes.
I hope this information was useful!
Did you know? Sometimes I don't have useful information.
So, I try to instead explain how to get to the other side of a certain room.
Although, even that explanation turns out unfinished and useless.
In order to not waste your time reading useless information, I adopted a color scheme for these signs!
Lighter-colored signs, like this one, indicate a hint for a puzzle.
But the darker brown ones you should definitely read! You might die if you don't.
I hope this information is useful!
